entry_a.title: Configure pytest-asyncio in auto mode
entry_a.content: Our pytest.ini sets asyncio_mode = auto so that async def test_* functions don't need the @pytest.mark.asyncio decorator.

entry_b.title: Tests must be isolated
entry_b.content: Each test fixture runs in a tmp_path; no test modifies global state. Test isolation is what lets us run the suite in parallel with -n auto.

notes: Both are about testing but advise different rules — configuring async mode vs. enforcing test isolation. A compiler that merges them would lose distinction.
